title: Craftable Sponge Recipe
description: Flooded and can't find sponge? Now craft your sponges real quick
body:
# Craftable Sponge Recipe

**Soak Up the Power**

Sick of raiding Ocean Monuments just to get a handful of sponges? Same. This datapack lets you craft your own cleanup crew — no Guardians, no grind, just pure absorbent magic.

Note: “Sponge Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.If you are interested in more Datapacks check out the links in the end of the description.

**🧠 Why It’s Better**
Because draining water shouldn’t drain your patience. Whether you're building underwater bases, clearing flooded caves, or just flexing your terraforming skills, this pack gives you the tools to dry out the world — your way.

**📦 How to Use**
1. Download the .zip

2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
 
3. Type /reload in-game

4. Craft your sponge squad

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Try out some more datapacks if you wish:
